name: medium-reader-pp-mcp
description: Read any Medium author, publication, or tag as a local, full-text-searchable corpus — direct from Medium, no key, no proxy.

medium_session.title: MEDIUM_SESSION (optional)
medium_session.description: Optional. Your own Medium session cookie ("sid=..; uid=..") to unlock member full bodies (Tier 1). Leave blank to run anonymously (Tier 0).
